org: Department of Telecommunications, Government of India
description: Selected through a competitive university exam to conduct research on the security posture of 5G architecture, focusing on subscriber information security vulnerabilities.
highlights: Developed an interactive Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) application utilizing 5G technical specifications from 3GPP.
Gained hands-on experience in cybersecurity research, technical documentation, and applied AI integration.

org: Centre for Development of Advanced Computing (C-DAC)
description: Completed an intensive training program on cybersecurity fundamentals with a focus on practical security operations.
highlights: Executed hands-on labs in network security, digital forensics, and ethical hacking.
Gained practical experience with industry-standard tools including Wireshark, FTK Imager, and Metasploit.
